name: Antibody Diffusion Properties
description: Guiding diffusion models for antibody sequence and structure co-design with developability properties. Design CDRs conditioned on antigen structures while considering critical properties like solubility and folding stability. Modified property-aware DiffAb.
capabilities: Guiding diffusion models for antibody sequence and structure co-design with developability properties
Design CDRs conditioned on antigen structures while considering critical properties like solubility and folding stability

pdbFile.description: Antigen structure in PDB format for CDR design

cdrRegions.description: CDR regions to design (e.g., CDR-H3, CDR-L3)

numDesigns.description: Number of antibody designs to generate

optimizeProperties.description: Whether to condition generation on developability properties like solubility and folding stability
